devdoc.details: Implements saving-plan administration, deposit lifecycle operations,      ERC721 certificates, C1 principal-first settlement, and C2 aggregate      reserved-interest accounting exposed to VaultManager.

AddressIsNotContract(address).details: A dependency address has no deployed bytecode.

AutoRenewalTooEarly(uint256,uint256,uint.details: The permissionless auto-renew timestamp has not yet been reached.

DepositAboveMaximum(uint256,uint256).details: The supplied amount is above the selected plan's maximum.

DepositAlreadyMatured(uint256,uint256,ui.details: The deposit has reached maturity and is no longer early-withdrawable.

DepositBelowMinimum(uint256,uint256).details: The supplied amount is below the selected plan's minimum.

DepositNotActive(uint256,uint8).details: The deposit has already reached a terminal lifecycle state.

DepositNotMatured(uint256,uint256,uint25.details: The deposit maturity timestamp has not yet been reached.

ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,add.details: Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. Used in transfers.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.
params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InsufficientApproval(address,uint2.details: Indicates a failure with the `operator`’s approval. Used in transfers.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC721InvalidOperator(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidOwner(address).details: Indicates that an address can't be an owner. For example, `address(0)` is a forbidden owner in ERC-20. Used in balance queries.

params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.

ERC721InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

params.receiver: Address to which tokens are being transferred.

ERC721InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC721NonexistentToken(uint256).details: Indicates a `tokenId` whose `owner` is the zero address.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

InsufficientReservedInterest(uint256,uin.details: Aggregate reserved interest is smaller than a required reduction.

InvalidAddress().details: A required contract address is zero.

InvalidAmount().details: A deposit principal amount must be greater than zero.

InvalidAprBps(uint256).details: The supplied APR is outside the supported range.

InvalidDepositId(uint256).details: The supplied deposit identifier does not exist.

InvalidDepositRange(uint256,uint256).details: Both deposit limits are nonzero and the minimum exceeds the maximum.

InvalidPenaltyBps(uint256).details: The supplied early-withdrawal penalty exceeds the supported range.

InvalidPlanId(uint256).details: The supplied plan identifier does not refer to an existing plan.

InvalidTenorDays(uint256).details: The supplied tenor is outside the supported range.

ManualRenewalWindowClosed(uint256,uint25.details: The manual-renewal grace window has ended.

NoPendingInterest(uint256).details: The supplied deposit has no outstanding deferred interest.

NotDepositOwner(uint256,address,address).details: The caller is not the current owner of the deposit certificate.

NotInterestClaimant(uint256,address,addr.details: The caller is not the claimant snapshotted at maturity settlement.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

PlanAlreadyDisabled(uint256).details: The requested plan is already disabled.

PlanAlreadyEnabled(uint256).details: The requested plan is already enabled.

PlanNotEnabled(uint256).details: The selected plan does not currently accept new deposits.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

Approval(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `owner` enables `approved` to manage the `tokenId` token.

ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool).details: Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

autoRenew(uint256).details: The new term starts at the execution timestamp and preserves the      old plan identifier, tenor, APR, and penalty snapshots. Exactly one      new term is created per successful call. Positive old-term interest      is funded by VaultManager directly into SavingCore before the new      ERC721 certificate is safely minted to the current old-NFT owner.      The caller receives no ownership solely for triggering this function.

returns.newDepositId: Identifier of the newly created active deposit.

claimPendingInterest(uint256).details: Only the claimant snapshotted at maturity settlement may call.      Pending state is cleared before the external vault interaction.      A failed payout reverts and restores the outstanding amount.

params.depositId: Settled deposit with outstanding deferred interest.

params.aprBps: Annual percentage rate in basis points.
params.enabled: Whether the plan initially accepts new deposits.
params.maxDeposit: Maximum principal, or zero for no upper plan limit.
params.minDeposit: Minimum principal, or zero for no lower plan limit.
params.tenorDays: Length of one term in days.

earlyWithdraw(uint256).details: No interest is paid. The snapshotted penalty is transferred from      principal to the current VaultManager fee receiver, and the      remaining principal is returned to the direct current NFT owner.      The NFT is retained as a historical certificate.

manualRenew(uint256,uint256).details: The old principal remains in SavingCore. Positive old-term interest      is funded by VaultManager directly into SavingCore before the new      ERC721 certificate is safely minted. The old certificate is retained      as historical evidence.

params.newPlanId: Enabled saving plan selected for the new term.

returns.newDepositId: Identifier of the newly created active deposit.

params.amount: Principal transferred from the caller into SavingCore.

returns.depositId: Newly assigned deposit and certificate identifier.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

updatePlan(uint256,uint256).details: Existing deposit snapshots will not depend on this mutable value.

params.newAprBps: New annual percentage rate in basis points.

withdrawAtMaturity(uint256).details: Principal is paid from SavingCore before positive interest is      requested from the authorized VaultManager. If the vault lacks      sufficient liquidity, the full interest amount is deferred for      the current NFT owner to claim later. Other vault failures revert      the complete settlement. The NFT is retained as a historical      certificate.

depositCount.details: Valid deposit identifiers range from 1 through depositCount.

planCount.details: Valid plan identifiers range from 1 through planCount.

totalReservedInterest.details: This value may exceed VaultManager's current token balance.

devdoc.title: SavingCore

DepositOpened(uint256,address,uint256,ui.notice: Emitted after principal custody and certificate issuance succeed.

InterestDeferred(uint256,address,uint256.notice: Emitted when maturity interest is deferred for later payment.

InterestReserved(uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Emitted when a new deposit interest liability is recorded.

PendingInterestClaimed(uint256,address,u.notice: Emitted after a claimant receives all deferred interest.

PlanCreated(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when a new saving plan is created.

PlanDisabled(uint256).notice: Emitted when a saving plan is disabled.

PlanEnabled(uint256).notice: Emitted when a saving plan is enabled.

PlanUpdated(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when a saving plan's APR is updated.

Renewed(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted after an old deposit is renewed into a new one.

ReservedInterestConsumed(uint256,uint256.notice: Emitted when a reserved liability is paid or compounded.

ReservedInterestReleased(uint256,uint256.notice: Emitted when interest is no longer owed after early withdrawal.

Withdrawn(uint256,address,uint256,uint25.notice: Emitted after a deposit is settled through withdrawal.

DEFAULT_APR_BPS().notice: Personal-variant default annual percentage rate in basis points.

DEFAULT_EARLY_WITHDRAW_PENALTY_BPS().notice: Personal-variant default early-withdrawal penalty in basis points.

GRACE_PERIOD().notice: Number of seconds in the fixed personal-variant grace period.

autoRenew(uint256).notice: Permissionlessly renews an active deposit after its grace period.

claimPendingInterest(uint256).notice: Claims all deferred maturity interest for a settled deposit.

disablePlan(uint256).notice: Disables an existing plan for future deposit operations.

earlyWithdraw(uint256).notice: Settles an active deposit before its maturity timestamp.

enablePlan(uint256).notice: Enables an existing plan for future deposit operations.

getDeposit(uint256).notice: Returns an existing deposit and its snapshotted terms.

interestClaimant(uint256).notice: Claimant snapshotted when a deposit creates deferred interest.

manualRenew(uint256,uint256).notice: Manually renews an active matured deposit during its grace period.

openDeposit(uint256,uint256).notice: Opens a fixed-term deposit and mints its ERC721 certificate.

pause().notice: Pauses future pause-protected SavingCore financial entry points.

pendingInterest(uint256).notice: Outstanding deferred maturity interest for each settled deposit.

totalReservedInterest().notice: Aggregate expected and pending interest liabilities.

updatePlan(uint256,uint256).notice: Updates the APR used by future deposits selecting a plan.

vaultManager().notice: VaultManager that holds bank-funded interest liquidity.

withdrawAtMaturity(uint256).notice: Settles an active deposit at or after its maturity timestamp.

userdoc.notice: Central SafeBank contract for saving-plan and deposit management.
